descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
All Awakeners' {Poison} Trigger effect +[Arg3]%.
Each stack of {Spellbound} additionally reduces the DMG dealt by "Humanoid" enemies by 1%, and when {Spellbound} is removed, each stack deals {Fixed DMG} equal to [DescArg1]% of target's Max HP on "Humanoid" enemies.
